_comment: Official AWS Labs Redshift MCP server (awslabs.redshift-mcp-server), local stdio via uvx. Read-only is engine-enforced — every query runs in a BEGIN READ ONLY transaction and there are no write tools. Provide AWS credentials via the standard chain (AWS_PROFILE / ~/.aws) and set AWS_DEFAULT_REGION in your environment — never inline secrets. See SETUP.md for the read-only IAM role. Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml.
